# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "Default Build Command"', description: 'Custom build command to execute')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: 'echo "Default Test Script"', description: 'Custom test script to execute')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_STEP', defaultValue: 'echo "Default Deployment Step"', description: 'Custom deployment step to execute')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.TEST_SCRIPT}"
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.DEPLOY_STEP}"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
